playbook.intent: Approved design -> handoff doc engineering can build from cold.
playbook.scope: Designer writes a handoff doc for one feature. Covers screen states, design tokens, motion, a11y annotations, edge cases, and Figma <-> code mappings. Done when engineering signs off and a build can start without follow-up questions.

success-criteria.criterion: All states covered (default, empty, loading, error, success)

stage.name: States + structure

tasks.task: Document default, empty, loading, error, success states

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when all states are documented.

stage.name: Tokens + motion
stage.decision-gate: Advance only when off-token values are zero.

stage.name: A11y annotations
stage.decision-gate: Advance only when AT behavior is concrete.

stage.name: Edge cases

tasks.task: List edge content (long text, empty data, rate-limited)

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when each edge case has a documented response.

stage.name: Code mapping + AI assist
stage.intent: Map design to code so updates flow.

tasks.task: Annotate Figma <-> code (Code Connect or equivalent)
Use AI design-assist patterns to generate variant tables

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when engineering confirms mapping is usable.

stage.name: Sign-off
stage.decision-gate: Done when engineering signs the doc.

extra.value: [States missed -> engineering invents them inconsistently, Off-token values -> visual drift on day one, A11y left vague -> production fails AT]
['Could a new engineer build from this doc cold?', 'Are tokens the only source of visual decisions?', 'Is the AT behavior concrete enough to test?']

{human: faion get-content dev-handoff-doc-writing-per-feature --format md, agent: faion get-content dev-handoff-doc-writing-per-feature --format context, json: faion get-content dev-handoff-doc-writing-per-feature --format json}
[{version: 1.0.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: Initial draft from F-059-063 chunk-05.}]
